case_title: MAGLIOCCO, JERRY vs. HERNANDEZ, FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-11-1995, CONTINUED TO FEB-07-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR "UNINSURED MOTORIST" STATUS REPORT OR DISMISSAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-23-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-23-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND FAILURE TO FILE UNINSURED MOTORIST STATUS REPORT. FAILURE TO APPEAR OR PROVIDE A SUFFICIENT DECLARATION STATING ALL ACTIVITY TO PROSECUTE THE CASE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL OF THIS CASE. HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

DECLARATION OF BRAD E. STOCKFORD IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAGLIOCCO, JERRY

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAGLIOCCO, JERRY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-11-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-12-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-24-1995

HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
